overview: Modena 360 Productions — a luxury entertainment production company landing site with 5 pages: Home, Who We Are, How We Activate, Our Work, and Contact. Dark navy and gold aesthetic with cinematic imagery and brand integration storytelling.
features: Cinematic hero section with brand imagery
Services showcase for film, music, events, and influencer activations
Portfolio gallery with event and production photography
Dark luxury aesthetic with gold accents and Playfair Display typography
All uploaded brand images integrated throughout
